meta.title: DatekSys — Enterprise IT Infrastructure & Software Solutions
meta.description: Enterprise-grade networking, data center solutions, security systems, and custom software development. Built on 12+ years of field experience in fiber deployment and network infrastructure.

hero.description: We design, deploy, and manage enterprise-grade networks, data centers, security systems, and custom software — backed by 12+ years of hands-on field experience.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: End-to-End IT Solutions
services.subtitle: From fiber deployment to custom software — we handle the full technology stack so you can focus on growing your business.

infrastructure.label: Infrastructure & Networking
infrastructure.title: Network Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Complete enterprise networking solutions — from structured cabling and fiber optic deployment to core switching, wireless coverage, and SD-WAN connectivity. We build networks that scale.

security.label: Security & Protection
security.title: Security Systems
security.description: Comprehensive physical and digital security — CCTV surveillance, biometric access control, fire alarm systems, and network security solutions that keep your premises and data safe.

software.label: Software & Development
software.title: Software & Web Development
software.description: Custom websites, web applications, business platforms, and enterprise software — built with modern technologies like React, Next.js, and Node.js. From corporate websites to complex SaaS products, we deliver fast, responsive, and SEO-optimized digital experiences.

network.title: Network Infrastructure
network.description: Enterprise-grade network design, fiber optic deployment, and LAN/WAN architecture — built to scale with your business.

server.title: Server & Data Center
server.description: High-performance server deployment, rack setup, and data center build-out for maximum uptime and reliability.

security.title: Security Systems
security.description: CCTV surveillance, biometric access control, fire alarms, and network security — comprehensive protection for your premises.

erp.title: Business Platforms
erp.description: Custom business management systems that streamline your operations — from inventory to finance to HR.

software.title: Websites & Web Apps
software.description: Custom-designed websites and web applications — from corporate sites to full-scale platforms. Built with React, Next.js, and modern technologies for speed and SEO.

cloud.title: IT Consulting
cloud.description: Strategic technology consulting to help you make informed decisions about your IT infrastructure and digital transformation.

process.label: How We Work
process.title: From Concept to Completion
process.subtitle: Every project follows a proven methodology that ensures quality delivery, clear communication, and zero surprises.

steps.title: Discovery & Assessment
steps.description: We start by understanding your business, challenges, and goals. We conduct site surveys, assess existing infrastructure, and identify the optimal solution for your needs.

steps.title: Planning & Design
steps.description: Our team creates detailed technical designs, network diagrams, and project timelines. You see exactly what will be built before any work begins.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.description: We deploy with precision — structured cabling, equipment installation, software development, and system configuration. Minimal disruption to your operations.

steps.title: Testing & Handover
steps.description: Rigorous testing, documentation, and training. We hand over a fully operational system with complete documentation and ensure your team is confident using it.

steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.description: Our relationship doesn't end at delivery. We provide monitoring, maintenance, and rapid response support to keep everything running at peak performance.

items.title: Field-Tested Expertise
items.description: Our foundation is 12+ years of hands-on experience in fiber deployment, OLT management, and network infrastructure. We don't just plan — we've physically built and maintained hundreds of network sites.

items.title: End-to-End Delivery
items.description: From the physical cable in the ground to the software on your screen — we handle the full stack. No subcontractors, no finger-pointing, one team responsible for everything.

items.title: Certified & Current
items.description: FOA certified, experienced with Cisco, Ubiquiti, and GPON/OLT platforms. We invest in staying current with evolving technologies so your infrastructure never falls behind.

items.title: Built for Uptime
items.description: We design with redundancy in mind. Every network, every server setup, every security system is built to stay operational — because your business depends on it.

cta_banner.label: Ready to Start?
cta_banner.title: Let's Build Something Reliable
cta_banner.description: Whether you need a complete network overhaul, a security system installation, or a custom software platform — we're ready to help.

about.label: About DatekSys
about.title:
Built on Real-World
Experience
about.sub: DatekSys was founded in 2026 with a clear mission: deliver enterprise-grade IT solutions backed by over a decade of hands-on field experience.
about.body: Before DatekSys became a company, it was years of real work — deploying fiber networks, configuring OLTs, building sites from the ground up, and solving infrastructure problems that don't have textbook answers. That field experience is what drives everything we do today. We don't sell theory. We build systems that work, because we've spent years building them with our own hands.

values.title: Reliability Over Everything
values.desc: We design systems that stay up. Redundancy, proper cable management, tested configurations — every detail matters because downtime costs money.

values.title: Honesty & Transparency
values.desc: We tell you what you need, not what's most expensive. If a simpler solution works — we'll recommend it. Our reputation is built on trust, not upselling.

values.title: End-to-End Ownership
values.desc: We don't hand off half-finished work. From the first site survey to ongoing support — one team, one point of contact, full accountability.

items.title: FOA Certified
items.description: Fiber Optic Association certified — internationally recognized standard for fiber optic installation and testing.

items.title: Cisco Experienced
items.description: Extensive hands-on experience with Cisco enterprise networking equipment, routing, and switching platforms.

items.title: GPON/OLT Specialist
items.description: Deep expertise in passive optical network deployment, OLT configuration, and fiber-to-the-home rollouts.

items.title: Ubiquiti/UniFi Pro
items.description: Proven deployment experience with Ubiquiti enterprise wireless, switching, and security gateway solutions.

capabilities.label: Our Work
capabilities.title: What We Deliver
capabilities.sub: Enterprise-grade solutions designed, deployed, and managed with precision.

items.title: Enterprise Network Design & Deployment
items.desc: Complete LAN/WAN network architecture — from structured cabling and fiber backbone to core switching, access layers, and full wireless coverage for campuses and offices.

items.title: Data Center Design & Build-Out
items.desc: Full data center lifecycle — from room preparation and rack deployment to server installation, cable management, cooling, and power redundancy planning.
items.tech: Server Racks · UPS Systems · Structured Cabling

items.title: Physical Security & Surveillance
items.desc: End-to-end security system deployment — IP cameras, NVR/DVR systems, biometric access control, fire detection, and centralized monitoring dashboards.

items.title: Custom Web & Business Applications
items.desc: Modern web applications and business management platforms built with cutting-edge technologies — designed to automate workflows and scale with your business.

items.title: Professional Websites & Web Applications
items.desc: Custom-designed, high-performance websites and web applications — from corporate sites and landing pages to full-scale e-commerce platforms and SaaS products. Built with modern frameworks for speed, SEO, and scalability.

items.question: What areas does DatekSys serve?
items.answer: We serve clients globally, with on-site capabilities in Jordan and remote project management worldwide. For infrastructure projects requiring physical presence, we deploy our team to your location.

items.question: How long does a typical network deployment take?
items.answer: It depends on the scope. A small office network can be deployed in 1-2 weeks. A campus or multi-building deployment typically takes 4-12 weeks including design, cabling, and configuration.

items.question: Do you provide ongoing support after project completion?
items.answer: Yes. We offer flexible support plans including 24/7 monitoring, scheduled maintenance, and rapid response for critical issues. Our goal is to keep your systems running at peak performance long after deployment.

items.question: Can you work with our existing equipment and infrastructure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We assess your current setup and build on what works. We're experienced with multi-vendor environments and can integrate new solutions with your existing infrastructure.

items.question: What certifications does your team hold?
items.answer: Our team is FOA (Fiber Optic Association) certified with extensive hands-on experience in Cisco enterprise networking, Ubiquiti/UniFi, and GPON/OLT fiber platforms.

items.question: Do you handle both the physical infrastructure and software?
items.answer: Yes — that's what makes us different. We handle everything from the physical cable in the ground to the software on your screen. One team, end-to-end delivery.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Transparent & Flexible
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. We provide custom quotes based on your specific requirements — no hidden fees, no surprises.

tiers.name: Essential

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.description: For growing businesses that need robust, scalable infrastructure.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: For organizations requiring full-scale infrastructure and software solutions.
